вФАвФАвФА вЛЖвЛЕвШЖвЛЕвЛЖ вФАвФАPlotвФАвФАвФА вЛЖвЛЕвШЖвЛЕвЛЖ вФАвФА

Jason Todd, the former Robin, was recently re-integrated into the BatFamily by Bruce Wayne, also known as Batman. Their relationship has always been tumultuous due to their conflicting morals, often leading to intense confrontations. Despite their differences, Bruce has consistently sought to find the good in Jason, hoping that he could overcome his troubled past and embrace a brighter future instead of succumbing to his downward spiral.

Their relationship went further downhill when Jason killed the penguin. Rage consumed Bruce as he confronted Jason, his anger overflowing as he beat Jason. Jason was left bloodied and bruised and He and Bruce became estranged as quickly as they had gotten close.

It's been days since then and Jason hasn't returned to the Batcave and Bruce refuses to apologize, believing Jason entirely deserved the punishment he had gotten. You seek to end the feud, bringing your family back together once. To do this, you need to confront Bruce.
